description: Automated Outlook account access with recovery email verification via Telegram bot

installation_flow.description: When user pastes this repo link, follow these steps IN ORDER:

steps.action: Ask user for required data BEFORE running setup

required_data.how_to_get: Buka @BotFather di Telegram → /newbot → ikuti instruksi → copy token
Buka @userinfobot di Telegram → /start → copy ID angka

required_data.ask: 🌐 Kirim proxy URL (format: http://user:pass@host:port). Ketik 'skip' kalau mau set nanti via bot
required_data.how_to_get: Dari Webshare.io atau provider proxy lain. Bisa juga set nanti via /proxy di bot

steps.action: Setup Python environment and install dependencies
steps.note: cloakbrowser[geoip] download ~206MB binary on first install

steps.verify: sleep 3 && tail -5 bot.log | grep -q 'started' && echo 'Bot running' || echo 'Bot failed to start'

steps.action: Tell user to go to Telegram bot
steps.message:
✅ Bot sudah jalan! Buka Telegram → cari bot kamu → kirim /start

Dari sana, kelola semua lewat bot:
• /addaccount — tambah akun Outlook
• /addrecovery — tambah recovery email
• /proxy — set proxy (manual/Webshare API)
• /run — jalankan batch login
• /report — lihat hasil

cloakbrowser.description: Stealth Chromium — 57 C++ source-level patches. Drop-in Playwright replacement.

httpx.description: Async HTTP client for Webshare API

telegram_bot.description: Telegram bot interface for managing accounts, proxy, and running batch login

commands./addrecovery email:app_pass: Tambah recovery Gmail + IMAP app password

proxy_modes.webshare_api: Auto-fetch dari Webshare.io API (20 proxy pool)

outlook_login_flow.description: Automated Outlook login with recovery email verification

substeps: If no code → click 'Use your password' (dispatchEvent)

steps.note: Direct navigation bypasses passkey setup page

key_discoveries.use_password_click: Regular click() fails on span.fui-Link. Must use dispatchEvent with MouseEvent on leaf node element.
key_discoveries.passkey_bypass: No skip button. Navigate directly to Outlook URL — cookies already set.
key_discoveries.send_code_required: Must click 'Send code' — code NOT sent automatically.
key_discoveries.recovery_matching: Masked email like 'na*****@gmail.com' can match multiple candidates. Try each one.
key_discoveries.code_timeout: If code not received after 2 min, fall back to 'Use your password'.

known_issues.imap_code_timeout: Microsoft sometimes doesn't send codes. Rate limiting suspected. Fallback: 'Use your password' works.
known_issues.passkey_setup: No skip button visible. Workaround: navigate directly to Outlook URL.
known_issues.login_slow: ~3 min per account due to 2-min IMAP polling. Optimization: reduce timeout or skip IMAP entirely.

optimization_ideas: Skip IMAP polling — always use 'Use your password' fallback (saves 2 min per account)
Parallel account processing with multiple browser instances
Session persistence via launch_persistent_context() to skip verification on repeat logins
Proxy rotation for batch processing to avoid rate limits
